channel.title: Daf Yomi
channel.description: Daf Yomi explained in English, text based, explanation based on Rashi, Sephardic reading.
channel.itunes:author: Rabbi Joseph Salem
channel.itunes:summary: Daf Yomi explained in English, text based, explanation based on Rashi, Sephardic reading.

item.title: Berachot 2
